form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Ascot Park but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.58) at Ascot Park in a Class 2, finishing fourth and beaten 13 lengths. Has two wins and three placings from 10 starts from the draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th in a Class 2 on March 27 over 295m at this track behind Wonderful Chaos beaten 5 lengths (17.76). Placed two back at Ascot Park. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (17.24) when third at this track in a Class 2. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Not to be underestimated.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at Ascot Park last start over 390m. Had won two on end prior to that last start placing. Has been around the mark at her last couple and should make her presence felt.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.13) in a Class 1 FIN, finishing a 1.75 lengths third. Has three successes and four minors from nine starts from box 8. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased and turned head around bend, forced wide into home straight.
Ran outwards in early stages and tightened.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 295m at this track. Downgrades so keep safe.
